overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a spacecraft flying low over a vast alien ocean. The pilot maintains steady forward flight before briefly panning left to observe the surroundings, then returning to the forward view. The scene features high-fidelity game engine graphics with a teal atmosphere and bright sun reflecting off the calm water surface.

agents.ego_description: piloting a spacecraft at low altitude over the ocean surface, maintaining a steady forward trajectory toward the sun

entered.detail: vast calm teal ocean stretching to the horizon with subtle wave patterns
bright white sun low on the horizon creating a strong reflection path on the water
futuristic cockpit heads-up display with radar, speed indicators, and targeting reticle showing NO TARGET
distant atmospheric horizon separating the teal sky from the darker ocean surface

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a steady forward flight over an endless alien ocean under a clear teal sky. The spacecraft's HUD is prominently visible at the bottom of the frame, displaying flight instruments and a radar screen. The sun sits low on the horizon ahead, casting a bright reflection across the calm water surface.

events.description: pilot turns the camera sharply left to look out the side window at the ocean
pilot begins returning the camera to the forward-facing position

agents.ego_description: briefly looking left out the cockpit side window to observe the ocean surface, then returning to the forward flight path

entered.detail: pilot's gloved hand gripping the flight control stick with a watch visible on the wrist
structural window frame and interior edge of the spacecraft cockpit becoming visible during the turn

segments.scene_description: The pilot executes a quick leftward pan to observe the ocean from the side window, revealing the pilot's hand on the controls and the cockpit interior structure. The view holds briefly on the expansive water surface to the left before the camera returns to the forward-facing position, re-centering the sun and HUD in the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady first-person flight over a vast alien ocean that briefly shifts perspective before returning to a centered forward trajectory. It begins with a direct view of the horizon under a clear teal sky, where the spacecraft's HUD and radar are visible against the bright reflection of a low sun on the calm water. As the flight continues, the camera pans quickly to the left, revealing the cockpit's interior structure and the pilot's hand on the controls while scanning the expansive water surface. The view then smoothly pivots back to the front, re-centering the sun and flight instruments in the frame. This movement concludes with the spacecraft resuming its steady glide across the shimmering, endless sea.
